title: ASXL1 / TET2 CH-leakage vs bona fide solid-tumor biology — disambiguation literature

results.title: Identification of Clonal Hematopoiesis Mutations in Solid Tumor Patients Undergoing Unpaired Next-Generation Sequencing Assays
results.why_it_matters: Variant-level CH rate stratified per gene in paired-tumor/blood cohort: 8% overall, DNMT3A ~64%, TP53 ~4%. Single most actionable quantitative anchor for t059.

results.title: Prevalence of Clonal Hematopoiesis Mutations in Tumor-Only Clinical Genomic Profiling of Solid Tumors
results.why_it_matters: MSK-IMPACT 17469-patient cohort; 5% patient-level CH misattribution without matched-normal.

results.title: Cancer therapy shapes the fitness landscape of clonal hematopoiesis
results.why_it_matters: Therapy-driven CH selection; source of pipeline's 7-gene CH priority list.

results.title: Therapy-Related Clonal Hematopoiesis in Patients with Non-hematologic Cancers Is Common and Associated with Adverse Clinical Outcomes
results.why_it_matters: Foundational CH-in-solid-tumor-cohort paper. 25% CH / 4.5% CH-driver in 8810 cancer patients; therapy-CH → subsequent heme cancers.

results.title: ASXL1 mutation-related clonal hematopoiesis and age-related diseases: clinical evidence and molecular insights
results.why_it_matters: Current ASXL1-specific synthesis of tumor-suppressor vs CH-driver roles.

results.title: Functional and cancer genomics of ASXL family members
results.why_it_matters: ASXL1/2/3 solid-tumor biology review. MSI-CRC polyG-indel (c.1927-c.1934 G8); ASXL1/2 in CRPC 2.0%/6.0%; HNSCC, liver, prostate, breast.

results.title: Clonal Hematopoiesis: Updates and Implications at the Solid Tumor-Immune Interface
results.why_it_matters: CH + immune-microenvironment axis. Distinguishes tumor-intrinsic ASXL1/TET2 loss from CH-cells in TME.

results.title: Clonal hematopoiesis in myeloid malignancies and solid tumors
results.why_it_matters: 2025 Nature Cancer review. Freshest authoritative cross-context CH synthesis.

results.title: A practical approach to curate clonal hematopoiesis of indeterminate potential in human genetic data sets
results.why_it_matters: CHIP curation framework; actionable sequencing-metric + annotation + population-frequency filters.

results.title: ArCH: improving the performance of clonal hematopoiesis variant calling and interpretation
results.why_it_matters: Artifact-filtering CH variant calling pipeline; 4-caller ensemble + error-rate estimation.

results.title: Tumor-derived neomorphic mutations in ASXL1 impairs the BAP1-ASXL1-FOXK1/K2 transcription network
results.why_it_matters: Tumor-derived ASXL1 neomorphic mutations are functionally distinct from CH-driver ASXL1; supports variant-level disambiguation.

results.title: Characterization of Plasma Cell-Free DNA Variants as of Tumor or Clonal Hematopoiesis Origin in 16,812 Advanced Cancer Patients
results.why_it_matters: Large cfDNA cohort; precision ceiling reference for variant-level CH-vs-tumor disambiguation.

results.title: Mutational landscape of metastatic cancer revealed from prospective clinical sequencing of 10,000 patients
Enhanced clinical assessment of hematologic malignancies through routine paired tumor and normal sequencing
results.why_it_matters: Operational evidence of paired-normal retention >10000 germline + CH variants at clinical scale.

results.title: Detection of clonal hematopoiesis of indeterminate potential in clinical sequencing of solid tumor specimens
results.why_it_matters: FoundationOne-specific tumor-only CH prevalence with variant-characteristic filters.

results.title: Bolton-lab MSK-IMPACT CH follow-ups
results.why_it_matters: Track as a cluster rather than individually.

results.title: CH cardiovascular / aging literature
results.why_it_matters: Non-cancer CH context; peripheral to this project.

results.title: CHIP-aware variant callers — review literature
results.why_it_matters: ArCH is best-documented; watch for benchmarks.
